confirmPwdReset.subject: Password updated successfully
confirmPwdReset.title: Password updated successfully
confirmPwdReset.greeting: Hi {userName}, your password has been successfully updated.
confirmPwdReset.warning: Don't recognize this activity? Please contact our support team.

requestEmailOtp.subject: Email confirmation
requestEmailOtp.title: Email confirmation
requestEmailOtp.instruction: Use the code below to confirm your email. It expires in {ttl}.
requestEmailOtp.footer: Enter this code on the screen to complete the confirmation.
requestEmailOtp.warning: If you didn't request this code, please ignore this email.

requestPwdReset.subject: Password reset
requestPwdReset.title: Password reset
requestPwdReset.greeting: Hi {userName}, we received a request to reset your password.
requestPwdReset.instruction: To continue, click the button below:
requestPwdReset.warning: If you didn't request a reset, please ignore this email. The link expires in {ttl}.
requestPwdReset.support: If you're having trouble, please contact support.

requestWinback.subject: Account reactivation
requestWinback.title: Account reactivation
requestWinback.greeting: Hi {userName}, we received a request to reactivate your account.
requestWinback.instruction: To continue, click the button below and complete the reactivation:
requestWinback.warning: If you didn't request reactivation, please ignore this email. The link expires in {ttl}.
requestWinback.support: If you're having trouble, please contact support.
